headline: Trane Technologies Recognized for Outstanding Corporate Integrity and Performance by Ethisphere and Just Capital
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, March 19, 2026--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, has been recognized for excellence in both ethical leadership and stakeholder engagement, earning designation as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere for the third consecutive year and recognition as the top-performing company in the Construction & Materials industry in Just Capital’s Best of American Business rankings.

headline: Did Trane’s NVIDIA-Integrated AI Cooling Leap Just Shift Trane Technologies' (TT) Investment Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, Trane Technologies announced major enhancements to its comprehensive thermal management reference design for gigawatt-scale AI factories, including two new Trane Continuum Rubin DSX designs engineered to integrate with NVIDIA’s Omniverse DSX Blueprint. The nearly 10% improvement in overall thermal management performance, which frees up cooling capacity without raising total energy use, positions Trane more directly within the infrastructure underpinning large-scale AI...
